nasb.text: but if there is no interpreter, he must keep silent in the church; and let him speak to himself and to God.

esv.text: But if there is no one to interpret, let each of them keep silent in church and speak to himself and to God.

cnv.text: 如果沒有人翻譯，他就應當在會中閉口，只對自己和對　神說好了。

ccb.text: 如果没有人翻译，说方言的人就当在聚会中闭口不言，只向自己和上帝说。

csbs.text: 如果没有翻译的人，他就应当在教会里保持沉默，只对自己和神说话。
